sections.label: THINKING
sections.content: Let me check if both red squares were collected.

sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check remaining gray squares
seg = current_frame.segmentation
nodes = seg['nodes']

# Find player
for n in nodes:
    if n['color'] == 'W':
        player_pos = tuple(n['boundary'][0])
        print(f"Player at: {player_pos}")

# Check gray squares
gray_squares = []
for n in nodes:
    if n['color'] == 'c' and n['pixels'] == 8:
        center_id = n['children'][0]
        center = nodes[center_id]
        gray_squares.append((n['boundary'][0], center['color']))
print(f"\nGray squares remaining: {len(gray_squares)}")
for pos, cc in sorted(gray_squares):
    print(f"  pos={pos}, center={cc}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
